# Global Reliability Theory

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 230ee859-1501-4b7a-b4a0-6a506a110189
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can knowledge be accurately assessed without knowing the process used to form beliefs?](can-knowledge-be-accurately-assessed-without-knowing-the-process-used-to-form-beliefs-antithesis-33b39370-50ee-4be0-ad32-3d0797adb4e0.md)

## Content

**Knowledge requires that beliefs are globally generated by reliable processes**, **A globally reliable process is one that produces true beliefs in a wide range of conditions**, **A person knows a proposition if they believe it and the belief is globally generated by a reliable process**
